ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-09-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The court ordered the case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 8/09/2011 at 10:00 AM in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
